name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC workflow with integrated code review, design quality, Diátaxis documentation, analysis, observability, and git lifecycle. 18 lifecycle commands (10 stages + 5 wf-design commands + wf-next + wf-status + wf-resume) with branch-aware git operations, 31 review commands, 7 aggregate reviews, 25 skills (14 design + 4 analysis + 7 Diátaxis), and setup-wide-logging command.
